title: BIC Kids 57 Piece Colouring Set: 18 Colouring Pencils, 18 Felt Tip Pens, 18 Wax-Free Crayons, and 3 Colouring Books
features: Add some colour and creativity to child’s day with this 57-piece colouring set.

As well as 3 jungle themed colouring books
